/usr/bin/c++  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/muse_plugin_scan.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/muse_plugin_scan.dir/muse_plugin_scan.cpp.o -o muse_plugin_scan  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/muse-4.2/modules ../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_cache_writer_module.so -ldl /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a ../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_rdf_module.so ../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_cache_reader_module.so ../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_list_module.so ../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_scan_module.so ../libs/xml/libmuse_xml_module.so /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libQt5Xml.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Svg.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19 -llrdf -llilv-0
